features_to_code.name: brand
features_to_code.description: Brand explicitly associated with the exact requested toy product. Use visible page text, structured specifications, or clearly readable packaging evidence.

features_to_code.name: manufacturer
features_to_code.description: Manufacturer or toy manufacturer explicitly associated with the exact requested product. Do not infer the manufacturer only from the retailer or brand unless the page states it.

features_to_code.name: minimum recommended age
features_to_code.description: Minimum recommended user age explicitly stated for the exact requested toy product, including age labels visible in specifications, safety text, or packaging.
